title: scabiosa intermedia
intro: Scabiosa intermedia, also known as the pincushion flower, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight infections due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scabiosa intermedia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
